description: Ablation study: does ## Implementation content (P3) degrade freshnessCheck decision accuracy on task-from-template?

H-P3.test: Friedman on per-fixture paired scores across 4 variants

variants.V3: V2 + 150-line P3 noise block inserted before Spec (~384 lines)

scoring: exact match on FRESH/STALE, F1 averaged over k=5 runs
